titleStmt.title: SII 9.5: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 5. (A.R. No. 542 of 1906.) ON A SLAB SET UP OUTSIDE THE SOMESVARA TEMPLE AT PUNGANURU, SAME ZAMINDARI AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This undated inscription records the gift of a wet land of a kaṇḍuga in sowing capacity, (to the family of) Kaliaṅga Kaṇḍanārāyaṇa who died after slaying nine thieves when the Bāṇa king Vijayāditya Prabhumēru was ruling over Vaḍugavaḻi twelve-thousand province and east of Maṇṇe and Kāḍuvaṭṭi-Muttarasa had come to raid Kōyatūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sakalajagatrayābhi
vanditasurāsurādhīśaparamēśvaraprati(ya)hārī
kṛtamahāvalikolōtbhava śrīmahāvalivā
ṇarasar vijayādityan vīracūḷāmaṇi
prabhumēru vaḍugavaṟi pannicāśiramuṁ
maṇneyinmūḍāyuṁ pṛthuvīrājyaṁgeye kāḍuvaṭṭimu
ttarasan kōyatūrge klēśake baṁdire Avanāḷma
letāṅgināyakanappon tanneḍadā
Ombadimbaro manemane kaḷarppokkoḍe A
jjavāgarā magannāraṇakuddika� Aṅgankaṇḍanā
rāyaṇan tanna maneyankanna miṭṭu pugutandoḍe Aṟidu po
ramaṭṭu pōta(ṁ)ndu kadi taleyindaṭṭi nālvarāniṟidon
mane pokka kaḷḷanpāre tandeṟidoḍe Avanoḍane Ayvarā
niṟidu tānuṁ maḍidōn Adakke posakeṟeyuḷkalnaḍu
kaṇḍuga kaḻani koṭṭodu .
Digital edition of SII 9.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
